chunks.text: MFI 00delta Thorax 00 d -Thorax: 4-bar with 1 PZN-PT Link Completed May 2000. Description actuator size: 5 mm x 1mm x(230 um PZNPT and 50 um steel) four-bar link lengths: input and output links=5 mm upper link=0.5 mm output link of the fourbar: 7 mm
pper link=0.5 mm output link of the fourbar: 7 mm x 1mm x 50 um steel beam input voltage= 150 V without the wing: ------------------- stroke angle: 30 degrees resonant frequency: 45 Hz Q=20
